sections.paragraph:
verb לחטוא

to sin, transgress; miss

verb לחטא

to disinfect, cleanse; purify; sterilize

verb חוטא (>>חֻטָּא)

be disinfected; purified; sterilized

verb להחטיא

to miss (aim, target) ; cause to sin

verb לחטא (>>חיטא)

to disinfect, cleanse; purify; sterilize

masculine noun

sin, fault, misconduct, misdeed, misdoing, misfeasance, offence, sinfulness, ungodliness, wrong, wrongdoing, crime
